title: Seseli lanzhouense
intro: Seseli lanzhouense is a species of flowering plant in the carrot family (Apiaceae), native to northwestern China. Research has shown that Seseli lanzhouense possesses various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce pain and improve cardiovascular health. The bioactive constituents of Seseli lanzhouense include seselin, apiol, and other volatile oils, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional Chinese medicine, Seseli lanzhouense is often used to make herbal preparations such as decoctions, infusions, and poultices, which are used to treat various ailments, including pain, fever, and digestive issues.
